targetNamespace="http://junsong.com/workflow" id="storeOpeningDef"><process id="store_opening" name="门店开业申请" isExecutable="true"><startEvent id="start" name="提交申请" flowable:initiator="initiator"/><sequenceFlow id="flow1" sourceRef="start" targetRef="task_region_director_approve"/><userTask id="task_region_director_approve" name="大区总监审核" targetRef="task_upload_materials"/><userTask id="task_upload_materials" name="履约上传材料" flowable:assignee="${initiator}"><documentation>审核通过后45天内上传租赁合同、营业执照。</documentation></userTask><sequenceFlow id="flow3" sourceRef="task_upload_materials" targetRef="end"/><endEvent id="end" name="开业流程完成"/></process><bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_storeOpening"><bpmndi:BPMNPlane
